description_long: This ornate house features a complex, multi-gabled roof with decorative ironwork cresting and a prominent central tower. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden siding, painted in warm beige and brown tones, with red accents around the windows and doors. A wide, inviting staircase leads up to a covered front porch supported by columns, while additional porches and staircases wrap around the sides. The windows are symmetrically arranged, each topped with decorative trim and shutters, and the roof is punctuated by multiple chimneys. The house sits on a raised foundation, with steps and railings providing access from several directions. Its overall design is reminiscent of Victorian-era architecture, with intricate details and a stately, imposing presence.
description: A large, ornate Victorian-style house with a multi-gabled roof, decorative ironwork, and symmetrical windows, featuring wide porches and prominent staircases.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main staircase, central porch, and the ornate tower with ironwork cresting.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wraparound porch, secondary staircase, and the tall central tower.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying symmetrical windows, a flat section of the roof, and the back porch with stairs.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side porch, multiple rooflines, and both chimneys.
attribute_entryway_design: Grand central staircase leading to a covered porch with columns, decorative railings, and an ornate main door.
